<<Mystery of the Death Register>>

In the temple there is a book that records the names of the deceased and the days they passed away. This book is known as the death register. It is used to keep track of the passing of each person.

* * *

The death register is also called the past account. It is a place where the names of the dead are written down. This book is important for the temple and its followers.

* * *

The death register is filled in when someone dies. It is a way to remember those who have passed away. This book is kept in the temple for all to see. The theory of death is recorded in this book. The theory of remembrance is also part of this book. The theory of life and death is written in this book. The theory of the afterlife is also included in this book. The committee is the one who manages the theory of the death register. The theory of the past account is important for the temple. The theory of the book is a key part of the death register.
